overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from a third-person perspective showing a cloaked character standing on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast mountainous valley during golden hour. The sun sets behind a distant snow-capped peak, casting dramatic warm light and long shadows across the clouds and landscape while birds occasionally fly through the frame.

agents.ego_description: standing motionless on a rocky cliff edge, gazing out at the mountain vista while wind gently moves the character's cloak

entered.detail: tall mountain peak with snow-covered summit dramatically backlit by the setting sun
stone outcrop where the character stands, overlooking the vast valley below
calm body of water visible in the valley, reflecting the golden hour light
dense tree canopy covering the valley floor between the cliff and distant mountains
ancient stone structure or ruin fragment on the left side of the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky cliff overlooking a breathtaking mountain vista during golden hour. A massive snow-capped peak dominates the background, backlit by warm sunlight breaking through scattered clouds. Below, a forested valley stretches toward a calm lake on the right, while an ancient stone pillar stands to the left. The scene is entirely static, with only the wind moving the character's cloak.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze over a vast mountain vista as the golden hour light emphasizes the scale of the landscape. It begins with a focused view of a cloaked character standing atop a rocky cliff, their garment fluttering in the wind. As the camera lingers, the perspective encompasses a massive snow-capped peak in the background, backlit by warm sunlight filtering through scattered clouds. The scene then expands to reveal the depth of the environment, stretching from an ancient stone pillar on the left down into a forested valley that leads toward a calm lake on the right.
